zh.Malpas, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾馬爾帕斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Dutton於1259年出生在英國英格蘭爾達頓時，她的父親Lord Thomas de Dutton45歲，母親Philippa Standon39歲。她於1277年8月之前與Sir John de Saint Pierre結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1293年在英國英格蘭爾享年34歲。

zh-hans.Malpas, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾馬爾帕斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Dutton于1259年出生在英国英格兰爾達頓时，她的父亲Lord Thomas de Dutton45岁，母亲Philippa Standon39岁。她于1277年8月之前与Sir John de Saint Pierre结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1293年在英国英格兰爾享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire, Lancashire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from either Dutton in Cheshire or Dutton in Lancashire. The first is named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’; the second from the Old English personal name Dudd(a) (see Dodd 1) + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Dutton was born in 1259, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Lord Thomas de Dutton, was 45 and her mother, Philippa Standon, was 39. She married Sir John de Saint Pierre before August 1277. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1293, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Dutton est née en 1259, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord Thomas de Dutton, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Philippa Standon, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John de Saint Pierre avant août 1277. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1293, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Dutton 1259 in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord Thomas de Dutton 45 und ihre Mutter Philippa Standon 39. Sie hat vor August 1277 Sir John de Saint Pierre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1293 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Dutton è nata il nel 1259 nel Dutton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Lord Thomas de Dutton, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Philippa Standon, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Sir John de Saint Pierre prima del agosto 1277. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1293, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Duttonが1259年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンで生まれた時，父Lord Thomas de Duttonは45歳，母Philippa Standonは39歳であった。1277年8月以前にSir John de Saint Pierreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1293年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Dutton(이)가 1259년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 드턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Thomas de Dutton(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Philippa Standon(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1277년 8월 이전 Sir John de Saint Pierre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1293년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Dutton nasceu em 1259, em Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lord Thomas de Dutton, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Philippa Standon, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John de Saint Pierre antes agosto de 1277. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1293, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Dutton родилась в 1259 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Lord Thomas de Dutton было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Philippa Standon, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de Saint Pierre перед августа 1277 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1293 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Dutton nació en 1259, en Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Lord Thomas de Dutton, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Philippa Standon, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Sir John de Saint Pierre antes de agosto de 1277. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1293, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 34 años.
